description: Connects to Recurly subscription billing to sync accounts, subscriptions, invoices, plans, and transactions into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Your Recurly Private API Key. Find it in the Recurly dashboard under Integrations → API Credentials.

install_fields.label: Subdomain (optional)
install_fields.help: Your Recurly subdomain (e.g. 'mycompany' from mycompany.recurly.com). Optional — used for generating direct dashboard links.

resources.name: Accounts
resources.description: Recurly customer accounts with contact and billing details.

resources.name: Subscriptions
resources.description: Active and historical subscriptions linked to accounts and plans.

resources.name: Invoices
resources.description: Charge and credit invoices with payment and balance details.

resources.name: Plans
resources.description: Subscription plan definitions including pricing, intervals, and trial terms.

resources.name: Transactions
resources.description: Payment transactions including purchases, refunds, and voids.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync accounts, subscriptions, invoices, plans, and transactions from Recurly.

apis.name: List Accounts
apis.description: Return all accounts, paginating through all cursor pages.

apis.name: List Subscriptions
apis.description: Return all subscriptions, paginating through all cursor pages.

apis.name: List Invoices
apis.description: Return all invoices, paginating through all cursor pages.

apis.name: List Transactions
apis.description: Return all transactions, paginating through all cursor pages.

name: RecurlyConnector
